languages.text: "В этой системе мы нашли шаттл с записью сигнала помощи от полка".
"We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."
languages.original_text: "В этой системе мы нашли шаттл с записью сигнала помощи от полка".

traits.locale_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."
"We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."
"We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."
"We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

languages.text: 「この星系でシャトルを発見した。その中には、連隊から送られた救難信号の記録が残された。」
languages.original_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

traits.locale_text: この星系でシャトルを発見しました。その中には、連隊から送られた救難信号の記録が残されていました。

languages.text: « Nous avons trouvé une navette dans ce système, avec à son bord l'enregistrement d'un signal de détresse envoyé par votre régiment. »
languages.original_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons trouvé une navette dans ce système, avec à son bord l'enregistrement d'un signal de détresse envoyé par votre régiment. »

languages.text: "Bu sistemde bir mekik bulduk. İçinde alaydan gelen bir imdat sinyalinin kaydı vardı."
languages.original_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Bu sistemde bir mekik bulduk. İçinde alaydan gelen bir imdat sinyalinin kaydı vardı."

languages.text: «Encontramos una lanzadera en este sistema. Contenía una grabación de una señal de socorro del regimiento».
languages.original_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

traits.locale_text: «Encontramos una lanzadera en este sistema. Contenía una grabación de una señal de socorro del regimiento».

languages.text: “我们在这个星系发现了一艘穿梭机。里面有来自这个军团的求救信号录音。”
languages.original_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

traits.locale_text: “我们在这个星系发现了一艘穿梭机。里面有来自这个军团的求救信号录音。”

languages.text: "Wir haben ein Shuttle in diesem System gefunden. Es enthielt die Aufzeichnung eines Notsignals des Regiments."
languages.original_text: "We found a shuttle in this system. It contained a recording of a distress signal that came from the regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben ein Shuttle in diesem System gefunden. Es enthielt die Aufzeichnung eines Notsignals des Regiments."
